codexWorkflow.iterationPolicy: Pick one ready feature, implement it end-to-end, update this file and feature_list.md, run verification, create a focused commit, then push only when explicitly approved or autoPush is enabled.
optionalVerification: xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -destination "platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16,OS=18.4" -derivedDataPath build/DerivedData CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
safeCommitRules: Do not commit node_modules, dist, Xcode DerivedData, or device-specific xcuserdata.
Do not push secrets, private keys, App Store Connect keys, certificates, or provisioning profiles.
Keep each commit focused on one feature or one repository-maintenance task.
Update the completed feature's status, acceptance notes, and verification evidence before committing.

features.title: Free Apple Account iPhone shell
features.summary: Run a minimal Capacitor/Vue shell app on an iPhone using Xcode and a free Apple Account.
acceptanceCriteria: The app installs on a real iPhone through Xcode Run.
The app opens without a white screen.
The shell page displays the app name and version.

features.title: Local journal CRUD
features.summary: Create, list, edit, and soft-delete journal entries stored locally.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can create a text journal entry.
Entries persist after closing and reopening the app.
Users can edit existing entries.
Users can delete entries with confirmation.
Entries are grouped by date in the timeline.

features.title: Search and calendar lookup
features.summary: Add keyword search and monthly calendar lookup with marked days that contain journal entries.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can switch between timeline, search, and calendar views.
Search matches journal title, content, and tags.
Calendar shows current month with previous and next month navigation.
Days with entries are visually marked.
Marker intensity changes based on entry count.
Selecting a date displays entries from that day.
features.notes: 1 entry shows a dot, 2-3 entries use a warm marker, and 4+ entries use a dark marker.

features.title: Repository hygiene and backlog system
features.summary: Track features in machine-readable JSON and human-readable Markdown, and keep generated files out of git.
acceptanceCriteria: feature_list.json exists and contains prioritized feature metadata.
feature_list.md exists and explains the iteration workflow.
Root .gitignore prevents generated build artifacts from being committed.
Already tracked Xcode build artifacts are removed from the git index while preserved locally.
verification: git ls-files journal-agent/build returns no files after cleanup
features.notes: Backlog files were created and generated Xcode build artifacts were removed from git tracking while preserved locally.

features.title: Draft auto-save
features.summary: Preserve unfinished draft text if the app is closed, refreshed, or backgrounded.
acceptanceCriteria: Unsubmitted draft text is restored after app restart.
Saving a journal entry clears the draft.
Users can manually clear the draft.
Draft storage is separate from saved journal entries.
features.notes: Use a separate localStorage key such as journal-agent.draft.v1.

features.title: Export local data
features.summary: Allow users to export journal entries as JSON and Markdown for backup.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can export all entries as JSON.
Users can export readable Markdown.
Export excludes soft-deleted entries by default.
Export includes createdAt and updatedAt metadata.
features.notes: Capacitor file sharing can be considered later; browser download is enough for the first pass.

features.title: Mood and tags
features.summary: Add lightweight mood and tag metadata to entries.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can choose one mood for an entry.
Users can add and remove tags.
Timeline cards display mood and tags.
Search includes tags.
Calendar can optionally color days by dominant mood.
features.notes: Data model already has mood and tags fields.

features.title: Search polish
features.summary: Improve search with highlighted matches, clear button, and result snippets.
acceptanceCriteria: Matched terms are visually highlighted.
A clear button resets the query.
Long entries show a relevant snippet around the match.
Search remains fast for at least 1000 local entries.
features.notes: Avoid adding heavy search dependencies until needed.

features.title: IndexedDB storage adapter
features.summary: Move from localStorage to an async storage adapter suited for larger journal history.
acceptanceCriteria: Storage API is async and typed.
Existing localStorage entries migrate once.
Users do not lose existing entries.
The app handles migration failure gracefully.
verification: manual migration test with existing localStorage data
features.notes: Do this before images, audio, or very large entries.

features.title: iCloud sync design spike
features.summary: Research and design CloudKit/iCloud sync architecture before implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: Document Apple Developer Program requirements.
Choose CloudKit data model and conflict strategy.
Define local-first sync states.
Identify required native capabilities and entitlements.
features.notes: Implementation likely requires Apple Developer Program.

features.title: Privacy lock
features.summary: Protect the app with Face ID / passcode style local authentication.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can enable or disable app lock.
App requests authentication when opened.
Failure leaves journal content hidden.
Fallback behavior is documented.
features.notes: Requires a Capacitor/native authentication plugin or custom native bridge.

features.title: TestFlight distribution
features.summary: Move from free-account local install to TestFlight distribution.
acceptanceCriteria: Apple Developer Program is active.
App Store Connect app record exists.
Xcode Archive uploads successfully.
Internal TestFlight install works on iPhone.
features.notes: Only needed when local Xcode Run becomes too limiting.
